TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lagos (√ąk√≥) nanmu drekalaveh a Nigeria i. Sangaw ni mepatseka, tanedju 21 kiya imalu a mekalulu a Africa i. Namudjini a pataw ni Nigeria inyan sangaw ngala 1991, asi nangale a drekalaveh a Abuja. Ningaveh a sudumangan ni Nigeria, nanmu a tarakelaveh ni kalasakut, aravak, atemazale, aziayai, tamazadeh, asadaljiki ni Nigeria na Africa.
S.PHON: …≠agus (*k*) nanmu …Ė…ôka…≠av…ôh a nig…ôria i. saŇčaw ni m…ôpats…ôka, tan…ô…Ču ** kija ima…≠u a m…ôka…≠u…≠u a a*ri ¶a i. namu…Čini a pataw ni nig…ôria injan saŇčaw Ňča…≠a ****, asi naŇča…≠…ô a …Ė…ôka…≠av…ôh a abuja. niŇčav…ôh a sudumaŇčan ni nig…ôria, nanmu a tarak…ô…≠av…ôh ni ka…≠asakut, aravak, at…ômaza…≠…ô, aziajai, tamazad…ôh, asada éiki ni nig…ôria na a*ri ¶a.
S.FORM: Lagos (√ąk√≥) nanmu drekalaveh a Nigeria i. Sangaw ni mepatseka, tanedju 21 kiya imalu a mekalulu a Africa i. Namudjini a pataw ni Nigeria inyan sangaw ngala 1991, asi nangale a drekalaveh a Abuja. Ningaveh a sudumangan ni Nigeria, nanmu a tarakelaveh ni kalasakut, aravak, atemazale, aziayai, tamazadeh, asadaljiki ni Nigeria na Africa.
